evidence_quotes.quote: games that are destroyed or rendered unplayable by switching off their online servers (or for other reasons)

paragraphs.text: HI there! I would like to share a topic that has been listed for too long. I talk about games that are destroyed or rendered unplayable by switching off their online servers (or for other reasons). If the consumer buys a game, he should become the owner, unfortunately this is not the case. I find it unacceptable that a game is no longer playable even if the game is played only with a player. This is why a movement was created, called ‘Stop Killing Games’, having already obtained more than 1.4 million signatures, the latter acting against this unfair habit. Please be aware of this movement.
